data.title: Avenir Group's Bitcoin ETF Holdings Increase in Third Quarter
data.description: According to Odaily, SEC filings reveal that Avenir Group, the family office of Li Lin, disclosed its Bitcoin ETF holdings for the third quarter. As of September 30, 2025, the group holds 18,297,107 shares of BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT), with a market value of $1.189 billion. This represents an approximate 18% increase from the second quarter, marking the fifth consecutive quarter as the largest institutional holder in Asia.

data.title: As of Q3, Avenir Group, owned by Lee Lin's family, held IBIT worth $1.189 billion.
data.description: SEC filings show that Avenir Group, the Li Lin family office, disclosed its Bitcoin ETF holdings for the third quarter. As of September 30, 2025, it held 18,297,107 shares of BlackRock iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT), with a market value of $1.189 billion, an increase of approximately 18% from the second quarter, making it the largest institutional holder in Asia for the fifth consecutive quarter.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 96,000 USDT with a Narrowed 3.84% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Nov 15, 2025, 02:42 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 96,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 96,000 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 3.84% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Hong Kong Securities Regulator Extends CEO's Term to 2026
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has announced the reappointment of CEO Leung Fung-yee for another two-year term, effective January 1, 2026. During her new term, Leung will continue to focus on regulatory reforms, market development, and seamless leadership transitions to ensure the SFC's long-term effective operation.

Leung was initially appointed as CEO on January 1, 2023, with her current term set to expire on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Crypto bottoms ‘rarely occur’ when everyone says they do: Santiment
data.description:
Crypto sentiment platform Santiment warned that when many people start calling a crypto market bottom, it’s wise to stay skeptical.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-market-bottoms-sentiment-social-media-forecasts-santiment?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: The US Solana spot ETF saw a net inflow of $12.04 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, on November 14th (Eastern Time), the total net inflow into US Solana spot ETFs was $12.04 million. Specifically, the Bitwise Solana spot ETF (BSOL) saw a single-day net inflow of $12.04 million, with a historical total net inflow of $358 million. The Grayscale Solana spot ETF (GSOL) saw no net inflow, with a historical total net inflow of $24.32 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of Solana spot ETFs was $541 million, with a net asset value ratio of 0.64%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $382 million.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 930 USDT with a 0.18% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Nov 15, 2025, 02:24 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 930 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 930 USDT, with a narrowed 0.18% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Cango mined 122.9 BTC this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to over 6,600.
data.description: Cango, a Bitcoin mining company listed on the NYSE, announced on the X platform that it mined 122.9 BTC this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 6,643.5 BTC, with no sales yet. The company also stated that it is aiming to reach a new milestone of 7,000 Bitcoins.

data.title: The US Hedera spot ETF saw a net outflow of $1.71 million in a single day; the Litecoin spot ETF saw no net inflow.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, on November 14th (Eastern Time), the Canary HBAR ETF (HBR) experienced a net outflow of $1.71 million. As of press time, the Canary HBAR ETF's total net asset value was $63.91 million, with an HBAR net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of HBAR's total market capitalization) of 0.91%. The Canary Litecoin ETF (LTCC) saw no net inflow. As of press time, the Canary Litecoin ETF's total net asset value was $6.29 million, with an LTC net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of LTC's total market capitalization) of 0.05%.

data.title: Harvard University held 6.81 million shares of IBIT as of Q3, a 257.48% increase quarter-over-quarter.
data.description: The latest 13F filings show that as of September 30, Harvard University held 6,813,612 shares of IBIT, worth $442.9 million; and 661,391 shares of the GLD Gold ETF, worth $235 million. Compared to the 1,906,000 IBIT shares and 333,000 GLD shares held at the end of June, these represent increases of 257.48% and 98.62%, respectively. In addition, Harvard University held 583,931 shares of Nvidia, worth $109 million.

data.title: Luffa announced it has reached 1 million registered users and upgraded to a "next-generation operating system for creators and the fan economy".
data.description: Luffa announced a brand upgrade to become a "next-generation creator and fan economy operating system," and announced that it has reached 1 million registered users and over 2 million app downloads. At the same time, Luffa launched new features such as live streaming, short videos, and a global platform at the end of September. According to the official introduction, Luffa, in the form of a value-driven social network, aims to become the ultimate Web3 connector linking digital interaction with real-world value. Leveraging blockchain technology, Luffa breaks through the profit-grabbing model of Web2 platforms, enabling creators, fans, and brands to interact and transact without intermediaries, building a new paradigm for the creator and fan economy, and returning value and control to creators and their communities.

data.title: Whale Opens Significant Long Position on Bitcoin
data.description: According to PANews, a whale identified by Lookonchain monitoring has recently opened a substantial long position on Bitcoin. Four hours ago, the entity, known as 0x0ddf, purchased 1,000 BTC, valued at approximately $95.3 million. The liquidation price for this position is set at $60,042.

data.title: U.S. Labor Department to Release September Employment Report
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics announced on Friday that it will release the highly anticipated September employment report next Thursday. The report was initially scheduled for release on October 3 but was delayed due to a 43-day government shutdown.

data.title: Canary Capital Pauses New Crypto ETF Applications Amid Regulatory Considerations
data.description: According to Foresight News, CoinDesk reports that Canary Capital CEO Steve McClurg announced the company has submitted all eligible ETF applications under current regulatory guidelines. For the remainder of the year, the company may halt new crypto ETF applications. The decision to file additional documents will depend on regulatory changes or whether new assets meet the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) requirements. Canary Capital will focus on managing its newly launched XRP ETF, which recorded a first-day trading volume of $58 million.

data.title: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has added "HKTWeb3" to its list of suspicious virtual asset trading platforms.
data.description: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has added a virtual asset trading platform called "HKTWeb3" to its list of suspicious virtual asset trading platforms. The SFC stated that the platform is not licensed by the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission and its website claims to cooperate with a virtual asset trading platform licensed by the SFC, but the platform has confirmed that it has no relationship with HKTWeb3.
